title: Opening for Production Engineer at Prince Pipes

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Prince Pipes
jsonLd.description:
Prince Pipes has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Noida office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Prince Pipes:
Prince Pipes is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Prince Pipes!
